svg.title: KYM Airflow pipeline architecture
svg.desc: Three-DAG pipeline: crawler discovers URLs, two parsing DAGs triggered by ExternalTaskSensor handle known and unknown templates.
svg.text: meme_pages(url, slug, title, template_type, template_id, status, metadata jsonb, created_at, updated_at)
meme_templates(id, name, type, selector_map jsonb, sample_url, created_at, updated_at)
memes(id, page_id, title, origin, year, tags text[], spread_desc, image_urls text[], raw jsonb, created_at)
meme_seeds(url, added_by, processed bool) — manual seed table
template_type: known | unknown status: pending | processing | done | error
